ui.text: Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.
Soft-drop four times.
ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.

ui.text: Hard-drop once.
ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.

ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid four times: EDGE, FULL, HELPER, then OFF again.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.

ui.text: Goal: remove one full line.
ui.hint: Move and rotate the piece into the hole, then Hard Drop to clear exactly one line.

ui.text: Goal: clear the full prepared board.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board.

ui.text: Goal: place the piece into the highlighted target.
ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.

ui.text: Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Move piece depth-away four times.
Move piece depth-closer four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ negative direction four times.
Soft-drop four times.
ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.

ui.text: Hard-drop once.
ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.

ui.text: Rotate camera yaw fine negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw positive four times.
Rotate camera yaw fine positive four times.
Rotate camera pitch negative four times.
Rotate camera pitch positive four times.
Rotate the board with mouse drag.
ui.hint: Hold Right Mouse Button and drag once to rotate the board.

ui.text: Zoom the board with the mouse wheel.
ui.hint: Scroll Mouse Wheel once to zoom the board.

ui.text: Zoom in four times.
Zoom out four times.
Reset camera once.
Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.

ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid four times: EDGE, FULL, HELPER, then OFF again.

ui.text: Goal: place the piece into the highlighted target.
ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.

ui.text: Goal: remove one full layer.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared gap, then Hard Drop to clear one full 3D layer.

ui.text: Goal: clear the full prepared board.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board.

ui.text: Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Move piece depth-away four times.
Move piece depth-closer four times.
Move piece to previous W slice four times.
Move piece to next W slice four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in XW positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XW negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in YW positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in YW negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in ZW positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in ZW negative direction four times.
Soft-drop four times.
ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.

ui.text: Hard-drop once.
ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.

ui.text: Rotate camera yaw fine negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw positive four times.
Rotate camera yaw fine positive four times.
Rotate camera pitch negative four times.
Rotate camera pitch positive four times.
Rotate camera view XW negative four times.
Rotate camera view XW positive four times.
Rotate camera view ZW negative four times.
Rotate camera view ZW positive four times.
Rotate the board with mouse drag.
ui.hint: Hold Right Mouse Button and drag once to rotate the board.

ui.text: Zoom the board with the mouse wheel.
ui.hint: Scroll Mouse Wheel once to zoom the board.

ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid four times: EDGE, FULL, HELPER, then OFF again.

ui.text: Zoom in four times.
Zoom out four times.
Reset camera once.
Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.

ui.text: Goal: place the piece into the highlighted target.
ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.

ui.text: Goal: remove one full hyper-layer.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared gap, then Hard Drop to clear one full 4D hyper-layer.

ui.text: Goal: clear the full prepared board.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board for an extra score bonus.
